compact_for_parent: Pass 1 (comprehensive) | HIGH | 1 must_fix, 5 should_fix | Key: Peak model inconsistent; Workspace-based AI mispriced; Dev shutdown savings invalid

findings.title: Peak-season cost model is internally inconsistent and not approval-safe
findings.recommendation: Canonical peak scope, recalculate with variable-meter sensitivities.

findings.title: Workspace-based Application Insights is priced with wrong billing model
findings.recommendation: Reprice as Log Analytics workspace ingestion.

findings.title: Savings opportunities are not operationally achievable as written
findings.recommendation: Replace with feasible actions; remove RI claims for S1.

findings.title: Variable networking and storage meters are omitted or understated
findings.recommendation: Add baseline/peak lines for PE data processed, egress, storage transactions.

findings.title: Cost guardrails below repository baseline
findings.recommendation: Add forecast alerts, anomaly detection, FX assumption.

findings.title: Intermediate subtotals and savings arithmetic do not reconcile
findings.recommendation: Regenerate all subtotals from one source table, canonical peak figure.

findings.title: Core SKU rates plausible but not independently auditable
findings.recommendation: Add pricing evidence appendix with MCP query details.
